title: Timing of a late run into the box
how_to: Scan before receiving the ball and time your run after the first pass.
Accelerate at a different pace into the half-space to get clear of marking.
why_valuable: Creates breakthroughs with timing rather than pure speed and improves decisions under pressure.

title: First-touch finishing
how_to: Position your body before the ball arrives.
Finish with the inside of your foot for control.
Choose a corner, not power.
why_valuable: Time in the box is short – first-touch finishes score.
drejebog:
Setup: 3 teammates, 2 opponents + 1 goalkeeper
Location: in and around the penalty area (goalkeeper in goal)
Ball: start at A1 (winger) at the edge of the box on one side
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) Place GK on target. A1 on an edge just outside the box with ball. A2 (striker) at the penalty spot. D1 marks A2 (half).
2) A1 dribbles 2–3 meters forward to create an angle. Move the ball with A1.
3) A2 times his run (e.g. towards the front or back zone) to break free. D1 follows.
4) A1 delivers/delivers to A2. Move the ball icon from A1 to A2.
5) A2 finishes on first touch. Move the ball towards the goal. Freeze frame on completion.

title: Coordinate runs with teammates
how_to: Avoid running the same line as the edge.
Agree: "I go/you go".
Communicate the run before it happens.
why_valuable: Coordinated runs create the greatest chances.
drejebog:
Setup: 3 teammates, 3 opponents
Placement: on the wing + into the box
Ball: start at A1 (winger) close to the touchline
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) A1 on the edge with ball. A2 in the box (central). A3 at the back post. D1/D2 in the box as a mark.
2) A1 dribbles towards the backline to threaten. Move the ball with A1.
3) A2 and A3 make two different runs (front zone + back zone) to create choices.
4) A1 hits cross for selected run. Move the ball from A1 to A2 or A3.
5) Finish on first touch or controlled finish. Freeze frame.

Stand at an angle to the next pass.
Communicate “back/calm”.
why_valuable: The team can maintain control and rhythm.
drejebog:
Setup: 4 teammates, 1 opponent
Location: in a triangle/square (combination game)
Ball: start at A1 with ball in the corner of the shape
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) Put 4 attackers in a square/diamond. D1 presses the ball holder. Ball at A1.
2) A1 plays to A2 (open angle). Move the ball from A1 to A2.
3) A2 plays on (1–2 touch) to A3 while A1 runs to offer new support.
4) A3 plays through/back to A1 in motion. Move the ball to A1.
5) Freeze frame: all have a clear fit angle + correct distance.

title: Timing in running in box (as 8's)
how_to: Entered the box late.
Be ready for cutback/return.
End on first/second touch.
why_valuable: "Late arrival" provides many goal chances.
drejebog:
Setup: 3 teammates, 1 opponent + 1 goalkeeper
Location: in and around the penalty area (goalkeeper in goal)
Ball: start at A1 (winger) at the edge of the box on one side
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) Place GK on target. A1 on an edge just outside the box with ball. A2 (striker) at the penalty spot. D1 marks A2 (half).
2) A1 dribbles 2–3 meters forward to create an angle. Move the ball with A1.
3) A2 times his run (e.g. towards the front or back zone) to break free. D1 follows.
4) A1 delivers/delivers to A2. Move the ball icon from A1 to A2.
5) A2 finishes on first touch. Move the ball towards the goal. Freeze frame on completion.

title: Be playable in half space
how_to: Find the half space between edge and center.
Receive in half turn.
Play through/out on the edge.
why_valuable: Half spaces are often the most difficult to defend.
drejebog:
Setup: 3 teammates, 2 opponents
Placement: on the wing + into the box
Ball: start at A1 (winger) close to the touchline
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) A1 on the edge with ball. A2 in the box (central). A3 at the back post. D1/D2 in the box as a mark.
2) A1 dribbles towards the backline to threaten. Move the ball with A1.
3) A2 and A3 make two different runs (front zone + back zone) to create choices.
4) A1 hits cross for selected run. Move the ball from A1 to A2 or A3.
5) Finish on first touch or controlled finish. Freeze frame.

title: Assess risk in your passes

Choose a safe solution in dangerous zones.

Location: in half space/central zone with space for turning/dribbling
Ball: start with A1 (ball handler) in half space
Animation: 5 steps (approx. 8–12 frames per step)
TacticalPad: use arrows for runs, dashed line for passes, and move the ball in each step.
Steps:
1) A1 with ball. A2 and A3 as support angles (one at the front, one at the back/side). D1 pushes A1.
2) A1 takes the first touch away from pressure and turns the body towards the free side. Move the ball with A1.
3) A1 dribbles 2–4 meters into space. D1 follows.
4) A1 plays to free teammate (A2 or A3). Move the ball to the receiver.
5) Receiver takes first touch forward. Freeze frame at 'good turn + next action'.
